name: list_devices
description: List all devices in your Balena account or filter by fleet. Returns each device's name, UUID, online status, OS version, and last connectivity time. Supports OData-style filtering and field selection.

parameters.name: $filter
parameters.description: OData filter expression to narrow results, e.g. filter by fleet or online status.

parameters.name: $select
parameters.description: Comma-separated list of fields to return.
